feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - Tools
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.
feed.subtitle: Recent content in Tools on
feed.author: errbuffoverfl
feed.rights: This content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International unless otherwise specified.

entry.title: Cytoscape.js
entry.summary: Website Graph theory (network) library for visualisation and analysis.

entry.title: Dopely
entry.summary: Website A bunch of helpful colour tools like pallet, tone, tint and shade generators. Also has digital colour tools for checking contrast and colour blindcheckers.

entry.title: Temporal
entry.summary: Website · Github Repo An open source programming model that can be used to provide in depth tracing using the concept of “business logic as code”.

entry.title: Distributed Press
entry.summary: Website · Github Repo An open source publishing tool for the World Wide Web and [[Distributed Web]]. It automates publishing to the world wide web, and seeds to IPFS and Holepunch.

entry.title: npm - SES
entry.summary: Website SES is hardened JavaScript. SES stands for fearless cooperation. This package is a SES shim for JavaScript features proposed to ECMA TC39.
